infobox.snapped: No<ref group="note">The finale of the [[Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D./Season Five|fifth season]] of ''[[Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D.]]'' takes place concurrently with ''[[Avengers: Infinity War]]''. By the end of the fifth season, Coulson says he would have "weeks, if [he's] lucky" before his death, and Melinda May says in the [[Missing Pieces|first episode]] of the [[Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D./Season Six|sixth season]] that they "got more [time] than [they] thought [they] would", which indicates that Coulson survived the Snap.</ref>
